response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar
ATTR client_code : integer

ENTITY Order
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR order_date : date
ATTR client_id : integer : FK

ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar

ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_name : varchar

ENTITY OrderLine
PK order_line_id
ATTR order_line_id : integer : PK
ATTR order_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_sequence : integer
ATTR quantity : integer
ATTR timestamp : timestamp
ATTR cost : float

REL OrderLine -> Client : 0..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
REL OrderLine -> Order : 1 -> 1..N : FK=order_id
REL OrderLine -> Material : 1 -> 1..N : FK=material_id
REL OrderLine -> Operation : 1 -> 1..N : FK=operation_id
